QA-08 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa08 homepage renders at mobile 375
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa08_homepage_renders_at_mobile_375 2026-06-12 13:43:18 15.02s
What this test was checking
Homepage must render without horizontal overflow at 375px width — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Homepage must render without horizontal overflow at 375px width.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording

QA-08 -002 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa08 arabic rtl layout mobile
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa08_arabic_rtl_layout_mobile 2026-06-12 13:43:18 15.00s
What this test was checking
Arabic locale must render RTL correctly at 375px mobile — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  3. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Arabic locale must render RTL correctly at 375px mobile.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
